answer: DataForSEO is a usage-based REST API provider for SEO and digital marketing data [1]. It is a self-serve platform with no recurring subscription fees [2][3][1]. While there is no traditional free tier, you receive a $1 credit upon registration to test APIs, which remains valid indefinitely [2][4][1]. Additionally, a Sandbox feature is available for testing and configuration at higher volumes [4][5]. The service operates on a pay-as-you-go model with a $50 minimum payment requirement for account top-ups [6][2][1]. You can manage your usage and spending directly through the user dashboard [6][7].
